title: carduus japonicus
intro: Carduus japonicus, also known as Japanese thistle or Japanese artichoke thistle, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to support digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various ailments. Carduus japonicus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
